Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-02-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
STEVEN SHIRLEY, 415-730-4061 defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona.
Robert Chan, Esq., 415-759-8877 for plaintiff and opposing counsel Julie Suzanne Ong.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT STEVEN SHIRLEY'S Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Judgment IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE PROOF OF SERVICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR# 8189. (301/BUSCH)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-07-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEVEN SHIRLEY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 06/27/05).
APPEARANCE: Steven Shirley, 730-4061 deft & moving party in propria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - OFF CALENDAR, FAILURE TO PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (301/PHA/ju) Court Reporter Sara Lerschen, CSR #6213

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-27-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Robert Chan, Esq. for Plaintiff: Julie Suzanne Ong, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Steven Shirley.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 585 27th Ave., San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $10,665.15
Costs per Memo of Costs.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Continued To Jun-27-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
